dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4267 IS: Strengthening American Nuclear Energy Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Lummis (for herself and Mr. Cotton) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources

form.official-title: To codify certain Executive orders relating to nuclear energy.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Strengthening American Nuclear Energy Act of 2026.

section.header: Codification of Executive orders relating to nuclear energy
section.text: The following Executive orders, signed on May 23, 2025, shall have the force and effect of law:

paragraph.text: Executive Order 14301 (90 Fed. Reg. 22591 (May 29, 2025); relating to reforming nuclear reactor testing at the Department of Energy).
Executive Order 14299 (90 Fed. Reg. 22581 (May 29, 2025); relating to deploying advanced nuclear reactor technologies for national security).
Executive Order 14300 (90 Fed. Reg. 22587 (May 29, 2025); relating to ordering the reform of the Nuclear Regulatory Commission).
Executive Order 14302 (90 Fed. Reg. 22595 (May 29, 2025); relating to reinvigorating the nuclear industrial base).
